title: Marlborough Family Deals
meta_desc: Discover the best family deals in Marlborough & Blenheim, including activity discounts, campervan hire, and travel insurance, from $180-300/day for a family of 4, with top activities like dolphin watch cruises and Queen Charlotte Track, and free activities like Picton foreshore and Momorangi Bay
intro: Marlborough and Blenheim are a haven for families, with sun-kissed beaches, stunning wildlife cruises, and a plethora of outdoor activities to keep both kids and adults entertained. With a daily budget of $180-300 for a family of four, you can enjoy the best of what this region has to offer. From dolphin watch cruises to exploring the Queen Charlotte Track, there's something for everyone in Marlborough.

sections.heading: Current Booking Deals and Discounts
sections.body:
For families planning a trip to Marlborough and Blenheim, there are some fantastic deals to be had. Bookme.co.nz is offering up to 40% off activities in Rotorua, Queenstown, Bay of Islands, and Auckland, which can be a great way to save on your holiday. Additionally, Discover Cars has family campervans available from $89/day, and Booking.com is offering free cancellation on most holiday park and motel bookings.

Cover-More Family Travel Insurance is also available from $4.50/day, providing comprehensive cover for your family's travels. With these deals, you can enjoy a fun-filled family holiday in Marlborough and Blenheim without breaking the bank.
list: Up to 40% off activities with Bookme.co.nz
Family campervans from $89/day with Discover Cars
Free cancellation on holiday park and motel bookings with Booking.com
Comprehensive family travel insurance from $4.50/day with Cover-More

sections.heading: Best-Value Activities for Families
sections.body:
Marlborough and Blenheim offer a wide range of activities that are perfect for families. A dolphin watch cruise is a must-do, with prices starting from around $80 per person for a half-day tour. The Queen Charlotte Track is also a great option, with short sections that are family-friendly and offer stunning views of the Marlborough Sounds.

For a more relaxing day out, head to the Picton foreshore and Waitohi Picton play area, which are both free and offer a great spot for a picnic or a swim. Momorangi Bay is another hidden gem, with crystal clear water and a sheltered beach that's perfect for small kids.
list: Dolphin watch cruise from $80 per person
Picton foreshore and Waitohi Picton play area - free

sections.heading: Money-Saving Tips for Families
sections.body:
To make the most of your family holiday in Marlborough and Blenheim, here are some money-saving tips to keep in mind. Firstly, book your activities and accommodation in advance to get the best prices. Consider visiting during the shoulder season, when prices are lower and the crowds are smaller.

Additionally, pack a picnic lunch instead of eating out, and take advantage of the free activities on offer in the region. With a little planning and creativity, you can have a fantastic family holiday in Marlborough and Blenheim without breaking the bank.
list: Book activities and accommodation in advance
Pack a picnic lunch instead of eating out
Consider a campervan holiday with Discover Cars from $89/day

sections.heading: When to Book for the Best Prices
sections.body:
To get the best prices for your family holiday in Marlborough and Blenheim, it's a good idea to book your activities and accommodation well in advance. This is especially true for popular activities like dolphin watch cruises and campervan hire, which can book up quickly during peak season.

Additionally, consider booking during the off-season, when prices are lower and the crowds are smaller. With a little planning and flexibility, you can have a fantastic family holiday in Marlborough and Blenheim at a price that suits your budget.
